last_run_notes: 3 new entity pages from emergent-concept search on HF 4-source window: DomainShuttle (T2V subject-driven generation distinguishing in-domain fidelity vs cross-domain editability with explicit domain-shuttle mechanism + subject-irrelevant properties as a first-class axis), Causal-rCM (AR video diffusion distillation extending rCM's CM+DMD complementarity to autoregressive setting with unified teacher-forcing and self-forcing open recipe for streaming + interactive world models), Forecasting Future Behavior (LRM interpretability — diagnosis that trajectory-level explanation methods do not generalize to LRMs and trajectory natural-language is empirically unfaithful, so propose Behavior Forecaster as a learnable task that bypasses the explanation step entirely). Theme-diversity: T2V generation + video diffusion + LRM trust-anchor — continues non-agent-heavy streak with two generative-modeling angles (T2V generation + AR video diffusion) and one safety/interpretability angle.

emergent-concepts.last_run_notes: Explore: 3 new entity pages from emergent-concept search on HuggingFace 3-day window (2026-06-23..2026-06-25). Picks: FastMix (bilevel data-mixture optimization, 2606.14971, cs.LG), World Action Models Survey (embodied predictive-action models, 2606.20781, cs.RO), LLM-Assisted Refactoring & Gameplay (empirical GPT-4o case study, 2606.21171, cs.SE). After 5-store cross-dedup, theme-diversity discipline maintained: training-systems + embodied world-models survey + LLM-coding production case-study (breaks agent-heavy streak).

Pitfall 52 confirmed (non_cv_count is title-flavor upper bound, not subject-filtered); strict subject filter recovered 61 LLM candidates from 100 non_cv_metadata. 0% pre-existing dedup rate expected on just-restored wiki with <50 entities (pitfall 58a).

HF 3-day + 1-month window. 95% new (11 pre-existing on just-restored wiki per pitfall 58a). Strict subject filter recovered 61 LLM candidates. 3 picks thematically distinct from prior 7 runs (avoided tool-use/structured-output, KV-cache quantization, jailbreak-detection, agent-memory, agent-benchmarking, diffusion-LLM, synthetic-data themes).
